name: ESI Energy Services Inc.
summary: ESI Energy Services Inc. rents and sells backfill separation machines in the United States and Canada. The company offers padding machines, pipe layers, and oilfield services equipment. It serves mainline pipeline contractors, and renewables and utility construction contractors, as well as oilfield pipeline and construction contractors. ESI Energy Services Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada. As of September 9, 2020, ESI Energy Services Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Battery Mineral Resources Corp.
